##NAMES=Annite
##RRUFFID=R060211

##LOCALITY=Mont Saint-Hilaire, Rouville County, Quebec, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Royal Ontario Museum
##DESCRIPTION=Black platy fragment
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(K_0.94_[box]_0.03_Na_0.02_)(Fe^2+^_2.07_Mg_0.57_Mn_0.33_Ti_0.03_)(Si_2.98_Al_1.02_)O_10_((OH)_1.72_F_0.28_)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
